display.name: Broken Bridge Crossing
display.short_description: A timber bridge hangs open over a narrow wash. One side still holds, and a line of repair spikes glints where the span snapped free.

choices.label: Test the hanging span
choices.summary: Cross on the surviving planks and accept the bruising if one of them gives under your weight.

choices.label: Salvage the repair spikes
choices.summary: Leave the crossing for another fool, pull the iron spikes out of the struts, and turn them back into useful edgework.
